import io
import string
import list

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(s, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut j = i
      mut scanning = true
      while scanning
        if j >= n
          scanning = false
        else
          let bb = byte_or_zero(s, j)
          if is_ws(bb)
            scanning = false
          else
            j = j + 1
          end
        end
      end
      let tok = string.substring(s, i, j)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = j
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_one_line() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_one_line()
let line2 = read_one_line()

let xs = parse_ints(line1)
let ys = parse_ints(line2)

let total = xs.len()
mut k = 0
while k < total
  match xs.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    match ys.get(k)
    when Some(y)
      println("#{x}+#{y}=#{x + y}")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end
